steps.title: Identify the angle pair
steps.content: Lines $m$ and $n$ are parallel, and the transversal creates matching angle positions at the two intersections. The given $170^\circ$ angle and angle $w$ are corresponding angles.

steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Corresponding angles formed by a transversal across parallel lines are congruent. Since the marked angles are in corresponding positions, their measures are equal: $$ w=170 $$ The answer is D.
